Print setup: Print at 100% scale on cardstock, and turn ON "Background graphics" in the print dialog (the color bands and green coupons need it). Cut along the dashed lines.
Page 1 = 60-minute Elbow Room gift certificates (the big prize) · Page 2 = four Elbow Room Free-30 coupons · Page 3 = four People's Elbow Free-30 coupons, redeemable at Hustle House Wednesdays.
